full_name: Nickel Alloy, Corrosion and Heat-Resistant, Sheet, Strip, and Plate, 62Ni-21.5Cr-9.0Mo-3.6Cb, Solution Heat Treated (Alloy 625 / Inconel 625)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Alloy 625 (Inconel 625, UNS N06625) sheet, strip, and plate in the solution-annealed condition for corrosion- and heat-resistant aerospace applications.

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of Alloy 625 as widely published by independent sources (Special Metals, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties of annealed Alloy 625, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for Inconel 625 is widely published by independent free sources (Special Metals, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 5599 designation used only as an identifier.
